name: Hot Water Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first three ingredients in a bowl.
2. Add the shortening and mix well.
3. Bring 2 cups of water to a rolling boil; add it to the cornmeal mixture, stirring well.
4. Let cool for 20 minutes.
5. Combine the baking powder and 2 tablespoons of warm water.
6. Add this to the cornmeal mixture; stir thoroughly.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls.
8. Press each ball between two fingers to make a slight indentation on two sides.
9. Carefully drop shaped dough into deep hot oil (375°F) for 55 minutes or until set.
10. Cool on a wire rack. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
